title: dischistocalyx rivularis
intro: Dischistocalyx rivularis is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the rivularis or the bushy rivularis plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dischistocalyx rivularis include reducing fever and pain, as well as treating various infections and skin conditions, due to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. Dischistocalyx rivularis is prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
